mapper.insert: INSERT INTO export_change_request ( export_order_id, request_user, request_reason, request_content, status ) VALUES ( #{exportOrderId}, #{requestUser}, #{requestReason}, #{requestContent}, #{status} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, export_order_id, request_user, request_reason, request_content, status, created_at, checked_at FROM export_change_request ORDER BY export_order_id DESC, id DESC
SELECT id, export_order_id, request_user, request_reason, request_content, status, created_at, checked_at FROM export_change_request WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT DISTINCT export_order_id FROM export_change_request WHERE status IN ('WAITING', 'CHECKING')
mapper.update: UPDATE export_change_request SET status = #{status}, checked_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM export_change_request WHERE status = 'WAITING'
